title: Button
description: The Button is a component which detects user interaction and triggers a corresponding event. It provides a clickable interface element with customizable appearance, loading states, and various interaction modes including toggleable selection.

sections.title: Color
sections.description: Explore color variants using the color property.

sections.title: Look
sections.description: Explore look variants using the look property.

sections.title: Size
sections.description: Explore size options using utility classes like ax-sm, ax-md, ax-lg.

sections.title: Use decorators
sections.description: You can use ax-prefix and ax-suffix to add elements to the beginning and end of a button. Import AXDecoratorGenericComponent and AXDecoratorIconComponent from @acorex/components/decorators.

sections.title: Using the badge in the button
sections.description: You can use the ax-badge tag to display the badge on the button and use CSS classes to determine its location.

sections.title: Icon button
sections.description: Instead of text, you can use the icon alone For this, leave the text value in the button empty and add a single ax-icon with the desired icon.

sections.title: Loading state
sections.description: Show the loading state using ax-loading content and how it affects visuals and interactions.

sections.title: Toggleable and Selected
sections.description: Demonstrate toggleable buttons with initial selected state and reacting to selectedChange.

sections.title: Form submit and reset
sections.description: Demonstrate button type 'submit' and 'reset' inside a form.

sections.title: Loading (async)
sections.description: Async loading with loadingText and a restart control.

props.name: iconOnly
props.description: When true, the button displays only an icon without text content.

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies the HTML button type to use (e.g., 'button', 'submit').

props.name: loadingText
props.description: Defines the text displayed while the button is in a loading state.

props.name: text
props.description: Defines the primary text to show inside the button. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

props.name: toggleable
props.description: Provides visual styling that indicates if the Button is active. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

props.name: selected
props.description: Indicates if the Button is selected or not. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines the color scheme of the component. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Fires each time the user clicks the button.

events.name: textChange
events.description: Emits an event when the text associated with the button changes. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

events.name: toggleableChange
events.description: Emits an event when the toggleable state of the button changes. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

events.name: selectedChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the selection state of the component changes. Inherited from MXButtonBaseComponent.

events.name: loadingTextChange
events.description: Emits an event when the loadingText value changes as part of two-way binding for the model().

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color property changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look property changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Triggers a click event on the button element.
 */
click(): void

/**
 * Sets focus on the button element and adds a focus style class.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes the focus style class from the button element
 * when the button loses focus.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean
